title: v1.1.5
text: - Added corruptions tab with filtering capabilities by item type
- This feature is still in beta and will be tweaked
- Now displays for which SoE version the wiki has information

title: v1.1.4
text: - Added ability to filter runewords by amount of runes in a runeword
- Added ability to filter runewords by runes
- Added ability to filter sacreds by runes

title: v1.1.3
text: - Added ability to filter only Hellforged items in the uniques tab
- Fixed some bugs in item descriptions

title: v1.1.1
text: - Added dynamic links to SoE custom skills in skill descriptions

title: v1.1.0
text: - Added Affixes table with sorting and filtering capabilities
- Added Skills tab with non-class skills descriptions added in SoE

title: v1.0.1
text: - Added orange asterisk indicator to unique items to mark it was added in SoE
- Improved the UI display on mobile
